option.name: SCRIPT_TEXT
option.value: if [ -f "main.S" ] && grep -q "USE_ASM \"Set to ON for Assembly, OFF for C\" ON" CMakeLists.txt; then COMPILER_ARGS="avr-gcc -g -mmcu=atmega328p -DF_CPU=16000000UL -x assembler-with-cpp -c main.S -o main.o"; else COMPILER_ARGS="avr-gcc -g -Os -mmcu=atmega328p -DF_CPU=16000000UL -c main.c -o main.o"; fi && docker run --rm -v "$PWD":/src -w /src avr-toolchain sh -c "$COMPILER_ARGS && avr-gcc -mmcu=atmega328p main.o -o firmware.elf && avr-objcopy -O ihex -R .eeprom firmware.elf firmware.hex"
